# Study Abroad (Pvt) Ltd

> Sri Lanka's trusted student visa and university placement consultancy since 2007. We guide students and families to world-class universities abroad with personalized counselling, admissions support, visa guidance, and end-to-end pre-departure and post-arrival care. Motto: "Global Minds. Global Futures."

## About
- Founded: 2007
- Location: No. 109, Kirulapone Avenue, Colombo 05, 00500, Sri Lanka
- Phone: +94 77 496 3373
- Email: info@studyabroad.lk
- Study destinations: United Kingdom, United States, Canada, Australia, Germany, Netherlands, Sweden, New Zealand
- Services: free in-house student assessment, academic & career counselling, university matching & admissions, immigration & visa guidance, visa interview preparation, statement of purpose guidance, financial & student loan guidance, accommodation & arrival support, travel support, pre-departure orientation.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.studyabroad.lk/): Overview of services, destinations, and student success stories.
- [About Us](https://www.studyabroad.lk/aboutus): Company background, leadership, vision and mission.
- [Services](https://www.studyabroad.lk/services): Full list of study-abroad and visa services, starting with a free student assessment.
- [Study Destinations](https://www.studyabroad.lk/country-details?country=overview): Country guides for the UK, USA, Canada, Australia, Germany, Netherlands, Sweden, and New Zealand.
- [Success Stories](https://www.studyabroad.lk/stories): Testimonials from placed students (2007–present).
- [FAQ](https://www.studyabroad.lk/faq): Answers on admissions, intakes, costs, and student visas.
- [Resources](https://www.studyabroad.lk/resources): Guides on accommodation and life abroad.
- [Contact](https://www.studyabroad.lk/contact): Book a free consultation.
